/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/civeeEngine.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/civeeEngine.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/civeeEngine.dir/src/Engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/civeeEngine.dir/src/Core/GraphicsContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/civeeEngine.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/civeeEngine.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/civeeEngine.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/civeeEngine.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/civeeEngine.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/civeeEngine.dir/vendor/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_sdl2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/civeeEngine.dir/vendor/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o civeeEngine  /usr/lib/libSDL2main.a /usr/lib/libSDL2-2.0.so.0.3200.58 /usr/lib/libGLEW.so /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
